    -0.427077442f, 0.117972292f, 0.014368156f, -0.520147026f, -0.0437407829f, -0.00718345679f, 0.151282236f, 0.137588799f,
    0.0541104041f, -0.200674102f, 0.0578989796f, -0.187278032f, -0.0352382138f, -0.0102108736f, 0.294358492f, 0.208295092f,

    0.0872832313f, 0.260293216f, -0.199720129f, 0.126191869f, 0.150543824f, -0.0762892589f, -0.426165402f, 0.142453298f,

    0.122529484f, -0.354819566f, -0.0237733424f, 0.19447431f, -0.0762693733f, -0.235411018f, -0.0637616441f, -0.195474133f,
    0.158171907f, 0.0512596779f, -0.412971407f, 0.100118704f, 0.486637771f, -0.176525533f, 0.0740466863f, 0.114699207f,
    -0.0424270816f, 0.00942469947f, -0.276859075f, -0.156558082f, 0.247566074f, 0.260241717f, -0.230625778f, -0.0298581515f,
    -0.724489391f, 0.197179288f, -0.0281063952f, -0.131201833f, 0.116509959f, -0.137786001f, 0.134918436f, 0.241328344f,
    -0.177327991f, -0.517557025f, -0.00302563421f, -0.117395744f, 0.0455533452f, -0.290780097f, 0.241509601f, 0.490987837f,
    0.160461381f, 0.233572051f, -0.262178838f, 0.0932523683f, 0.217312276f, -0.443692088f, -0.207059458f, 0.276734978f,
    -0.050696101f, -0.372706383f, 0.561912417f, -0.100282118f, -0.0672523975f, -0.259007752f, 0.0909587517f, -0.0473842546f,
    0.204670891f, -0.356938303f, 0.220769599f, 0.21810779f, -0.042670019f, -0.182136312f, -0.371854275f, -0.244392425f,
    0.260362923f, 0.0964675248f, 0.26152584f, -0.234033734f, -0.512561738f, 0.00925307348f, 0.192548752f, -0.298038751f,
    0.190552995f, 0.045874279f, -0.115709662f, 0.418480724f, -0.46072197f, -0.0914901271f, 0.0249539111f, 0.0372410826f,
    0.0297890436f, 0.271106899f, -0.75412935f, -0.00490340451f, -0.253276169f, -0.164828852f, 0.39767468f, 0.0218360033f,
    -0.0545855612f, -0.730921865f, -0.473291129f, 0.122667283f, -0.0362169594f, -0.0327873379f, 0.155674323f, -0.384072542f,
    0.138210505f, 0.232245818f, -0.69836086f, -0.0496421009f, 0.0918353572f, -0.206217363f, -0.0335869864f, 0.379369378f,
};
#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__
alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float LAM_BLK2_B[16] =
#else
alignas(16) inline constexpr float LAM_BLK2_B[16] =
#endif
{
    0.00897079799f, 0.0109443087f, 0.155086622f, -0.0770679787f, 0.0554629564f, 0.0210965443f, 0.220462739f, -0.0779485255f,
    0.145161316f, 0.0920321047f, 0.148282871f, 0.193249777f, 0.176982656f, 0.146920934f, 0.192403898f, -0.0449886359f,
};
#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__
alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float LAM_OUT_W[64] =
#else
alignas(16) inline constexpr float LAM_OUT_W[64] =
#endif
{
    -0.0458551981f, -0.234387845f, -0.156653285f, 0.278784543f, 0.224355489f, -0.232055932f, -0.0709759295f, -0.0623843186f,
    0.190224648f, -0.34991771f, -0.240628809f, -0.134909064f, -0.194822714f, -0.0604195632f, 0.200166702f, 0.0649915636f,
    -0.486482888f, 0.260137767f, 0.37483409f, 0.359524846f, 0.217383966f, -0.0116023943f, 0.345023692f, -0.306282431f,
    -0.299669027f, 0.0726060271f, -0.041282732f, -0.183689147f, -0.390324384f, 0.10536807f, 0.0877967477f, 0.0344319902f,
    -0.0454561263f, 0.194159269f, -0.0931705534f, -0.0105514573f, 0.16909118f, -0.213015929f, -0.00464074919f, 0.124920405f,
    0.194345817f, -0.105974637f, 0.300378025f, 0.09646824f, -0.17951487f, 0.121890731f, 0.216517255f, -0.224023268f,
    -0.367699862f, 0.23087889f, -0.14673835f, -0.112502657f, -0.0388573594f, -0.223639503f, -0.118526235f, 0.116651341f,
    -0.0415217541f, -0.203136623f, 0.130395338f, -0.114133887f, 0.0133379307f, -0.161185205f, -0.302032381f, -0.084646225f,
};

template<bool ReLU>
FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void AddBlockWidth(const float* __restrict__ xin, float* __restrict__ xout, const float* __restrict__ W, const float* __restrict__ B) 
{
    float tmp[WIDTH];
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(xin, tmp, 0, 0, W, B);
    CUDA_UNROLL
    for (int i = 0; i < WIDTH; ++i) 
    {
        xout[i] = xin[i] + tmp[i];
    }
}

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void RGBEncode(const float* __restrict__ in3, float* __restrict__ outK) 
{
    const float inP3[3] = {sqrtf(in3[0]), sqrtf(in3[1]), sqrtf(in3[2])};                
    float h[WIDTH];
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<3, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*ReLU=*/true, /*Opt=*/true>(inP3, h, 0, 0, RGB_IN_W, RGB_IN_B);
    const float I = sqrtf(0.2126f*in3[0] + 0.7152f*in3[1] + 0.0722f*in3[2]);
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK0_W, RGB_BLK0_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK1_W, RGB_BLK1_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK2_W, RGB_BLK2_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK3_W, RGB_BLK3_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK4_W, RGB_BLK4_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK5_W, RGB_BLK5_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK6_W, RGB_BLK6_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, KERNEL, /*bBias=*/false, /*bReLU=*/false, /*Opt=*/true>(h, outK, 0, 0, RGB_OUT_W, nullptr);
    CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int i = 0; i < KERNEL; ++i)
        {
            outK[i] *= I;
        }
    }

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void LambdaEncode(const float* __restrict__ in1, float* __restrict__ outK) 
{
    const float x = fminf(fmaxf((in1[0] - 360.0f) / (780.0f - 360.0f), 0.0f), 1.0f);

    float h[WIDTH];
    // sincos: h = [sin(2pix), cos(2pix), sin(4pix), cos(4pix), ...]
    {
        constexpr float TWO_PI = 6.28318530717958647692f;
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = x * TWO_PI * (k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &h[k], &h[k + WIDTH/2]);
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK0_W, LAM_BLK0_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK1_W, LAM_BLK1_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK2_W, LAM_BLK2_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, KERNEL, /*bBias=*/false, /*bReLU=*/false, /*Opt=*/true>(h, outK, 0, 0, LAM_OUT_W, nullptr);
}
    
FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE float SpectralInteract(const float* __restrict__ RGBKernel, const float* __restrict__ LambdaKernel) 
{
    float acc = 0.0f;
    CUDA_UNROLL
    for (int i = 0; i < KERNEL; ++i) 
    {
        acc = fmaf(RGBKernel[i], LambdaKernel[i], acc);
    }
    // sigmoid
    //return 1.0f / (1.0f + expf(-acc));
    // softclamp01_exp
    return 1.0f - expf(-fmaxf(acc, 0.0f));
}

alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float inputTest[4][100] =
#else
alignas(16) inline constexpr float inputTest[4][100] =
#endif
{

#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__
alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float gtTest[100] =
#else
alignas(16) inline constexpr float gtTest[100] =
#endif
{
    0.971316874f, 0.808530629f, 0.680253208f, 0.420316815f, 0.640057564f, 0.449193835f, 0.46651274f, 0.953763247f, 0.0756872892f, 0.072717309f, 0.134681523f, 0.414015055f, 0.115269482f, 0.291068017f, 0.850192785f, 0.886915445f, 0.285971463f, 0.256978989f, 0.487451792f, 0.840082169f, 0.367405713f, 0.791174531f, 0.573904812f, 0.321932435f, 0.384593964f, 0.381287456f, 0.361174881f, 0.242273092f, 0.61506325f, 0.762037992f, 0.903759062f, 0.632517815f, 0.629907846f, 0.111291349f, 0.68442893f, 0.444247365f, 0.590671182f, 0.947564662f, 0.717473507f, 0.146665215f, 0.29767555f, 0.539977729f, 0.560800254f, 0.675805509f, 0.191347182f, 0.155110538f, 0.352001607f, 0.704288602f, 0.885796905f, 0.402357459f, 0.137413979f, 0.817239702f, 0.0969856381f, 0.33455354f, 0.709165812f, 0.299304903f, 0.543398261f, 0.537376285f, 0.460707486f, 0.332505047f, 0.460297942f, 0.726980031f, 0.944279373f, 0.553383112f, 0.513206244f, 0.41125375f, 0.107148886f, 0.314514399f, 0.413354695f, 0.338130295f, 0.508244634f, 0.834914505f, 0.471385241f, 0.447540462f, 0.0331171155f, 0.669054031f, 0.134080768f, 0.420382977f, 0.684975505f, 0.714997113f, 0.279949427f, 0.34724158f, 0.384300649f, 0.602072239f, 0.283722579f, 0.319492519f, 0.335198581f, 0.690788507f, 0.229966402f, 0.615767837f, 0.459062517f, 0.476361394f, 0.617393613f, 0.453317642f, 0.658758163f, 0.44725436f, 0.850538135f, 0.919430017f, 0.507105589f, 0.247028828f
};

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void SelfTestSimple()
{
    float mse = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < 100; ++i)
    {
        const float rgb3[3] = { inputTest[0][i], inputTest[1][i], inputTest[2][i] };
        const float lam1[1] = { inputTest[3][i] };

        float k1[KERNEL];
        float k2[KERNEL];

        RGBEncode(rgb3, k1);
        LambdaEncode(lam1, k2);
        const float pred = SpectralInteract(k1, k2);

        const float err = pred - gtTest[i];
        mse += err * err;

        std::printf("[test #%02d] pred=%.9f  gt=%.9f  err=%.9e\n", i, pred, gtTest[i], err);
    }
    mse /= 100.0f;    std::printf("[test] MSE=%.9e\n", mse);
}
}
